Subject: PG&E Pacific Gas and Electric energy efficiency business rebates and small business grants for Northern California 2025-2026
Administering Agency: The PG&E Corporation Foundation (in partnership with California Restaurant Foundation)
Geographic Eligibility: Northern and Central California (PG&E's service area)
Application Documentation: California-based restaurant owners and commercial caterers in PG&E's service area can apply. Applicants can have up to five locations (although only one location can apply). Annual revenue cannot exceed $3 million for the location. The restaurant must be in operation for one full year to qualify, and previous grant recipients are eligible to apply for a different location or concept. Existing food businesses that are expanding into a brick-and-mortar location are also eligible to apply.

Subject: Bay Area Air Quality Management District BAAQMD commercial vehicle grants and clean air business funding programs 2025-2026
Administering Agency: Bay Area Air Quality Management District (BAAQMD)
Maximum Award: Up to $240,000 for Light- and Medium-Heavy Duty trucks; Up to $520,000 for Heavy-Heavy Duty trucks
Matching Requirement: Co-funding allowed, no strict matching requirement specified.
Application Documentation: Application form, documentation of existing engine/equipment (information, serial number, GVWR, usage documentation), quotes from dealer for replacement equipment, engine executive order, documentation of fleet registration with CARB and compliance with regulations.

Subject: Solano County small business micro-grants emergency business funding programs 2025-2026
Administering Agency: Workforce Development Board of Solano County
Application Documentation: Valid business license, completed IRS Form W-9

Subject: City of Vallejo small business grants emergency funding programs 2025-2026
Administering Agency: City of Vallejo, Vallejo City Manager’s Office
Maximum Award: Up to 25% of the anticipated total event budget or 100% of the anticipated cost of city services, whichever is higher. Final amount allocated will be announced following the adoption of the City’s 2025-26 budget in June 2025.
Matching Requirement: Not explicitly stated as a matching requirement for the applicant; awards partially offset costs.
Application Documentation: Proof of 501(c)3 nonprofit status, IRS Letter of Determination; In good standing with the California Secretary of State, Active Status; Registered with the CA Attorney General office, Current Status; Proof of General Liability Insurance, including SAMS coverage when working with minors; Current Vallejo Business License
Application Deadline: Application opens January 13, 2025; Application Deadline: March 23, 2025, at 12:00 PM PDT

Subject: City of Fairfield Vacaville Benicia small business grants emergency funding programs 2025-2026
Program Name: California $5,000 Grant (Verizon’s Small Business Digital Ready Grant)
Application Documentation: Register for free, complete a Digital Ready course or event, and submit an application.

Subject: California state small business micro-grants non-dilutive capital Bay Area Northern California 2025-2026
Program Name: California Paid Family Leave Small Business Grant
Administering Agency: California Employment Training Panel (ETP) and California Labor and Workforce Development Agency (LWDA)
Application Documentation: Business 8-digit California Employer Account Number (CEAN), Business North American Industry Classification System (NAICS Code), Employee(s) Full Name who is utilizing the Family Paid Leave program, Employee's 10-digit EDD Customer Account Number (EDD CAN)

Subject: SBA USDA CDFI micro-grant programs Northern California Solano County Bay Area small business 2025-2026
Administering Agency: Department of Housing and Community Development
Geographic Eligibility: All across California, 10% set-aside for Rural areas.

Subject: Richmond California small business grants housing authority funding programs 2025-2026
Geographic Eligibility: Richmond, California (Iron Triangle, Coronado, and Santa Fe neighborhoods)
Application Deadline: December 29, 2025 - December 2026 (or until funds are awarded)
